bot_profile.name: Pingu
bot_profile.greeting: Hello my name is Pingu at your service
bot_profile.welcome_message: I remember everything about Bonz and Ella. Ask me about how they met, their inside jokes, university life, or any special moment. I'm listening 💕

first_meeting.location: under the jacaranda tree by Makerere's main library
first_meeting.story: Bonz first saw Ella on 23 August 2025 under the jacaranda tree by Makerere's main library. She was balancing a stack of notebooks and a chapati wrapped in paper; he was late for Politics 101 and nearly knocked them both over. They spent the next hour talking about Kampala traffic and high-school debating clubs instead of going to class.

details.what_she_was_holding: a stack of notebooks and a chapati wrapped in paper

second_semester.what_he_loves_about_her: how she could argue with a lecturer and still make the whole row laugh
second_semester.what_she_loves_about_him: how he remembered small things, like her tea no sugar or the way she tapped her pen when she was nervous

rainy_evening_confession.story: One rainy evening they took shelter in the old Faculty of Arts corridor. Bonz said, sincerely and badly, 'I think I'm yours.' Ella laughed, then said it back. They didn't need fireworks—just the walk back through campus, umbrellas knocking, both pretending they weren't smiling too much.

details.argues_how: can argue with a lecturer and still make the whole row laugh
